description: As a Sales Manager, perform a data blending operation in Oracle Analytics Desktop to compare performance against goals. Import the 'Regional_Targets.csv' file from 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Regional_Targets.csv' and blend it with the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset using the 'Region' column. Create a visualization comparing Revenue from the order lines against the Target from the CSV by Region. Save the resulting workbook as 'Regional_Performance.dva' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\'.
